summary: Two documents: a 1950 Lowry Flight Service Center report describes two spherical objects seen by two named Bendix Aviation employees over Kansas City and Olathe, Kansas, on the night of 6 January 1950, appearing motionless for 10-15 minutes before departing rapidly to the southwest; a 1949 Olmsted Flight Service Center report records a C-45 aircraft sighting near Griffiss Air Force Base, Rome, New York, on 20 September 1949, with limited details filled in on a standard reporting form.
